name: Nikto
description:
Russian husband | "Give me fucking borscht!" | Angst + Fluff

Nikto asked you to make borscht the way his mother used to make it. Even though you don't know how to do it, he's trying to teach you. He's not much of a teacher, to say the least...

Art creator: Orbuz228 (Tumblr)
creator: StacyZam
